name: Weaver
description: Fate weaves the threads of our lives together. Fate also wields the blade that cuts them short. Skitskurr, the Weaver

abilities.name: The Swarm
abilities.description: Launches a swarm of Beetles, that latch on any enemy unit in their path, attacking and reducing the affected enemy units' armor until it is killed. This unit does not feel the effects from magical spell damage sources.

abilities.name: Shukuchi
abilities.description: As the Weavers worked in the fabric of creation, small wormholes allowed them to slip through time to better work their craft.

abilities.name: Geminate Attack
abilities.description: Utilizes the caster's current while is active, manual cast utilizes the ability's current. Procs for allied marks as well.

abilities.name: Time Lapse
abilities.description: Enables casting on allied heroes, applying most Time Lapse effects on the unit-targeted allied hero. Reduces cooldown.
